violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The sink in the room with the ice machine was observed in poor repair (side panel not sealed). Water was observed leaking from the side of the sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The dishwasher and ice machine was observed with an air-break. The equipment must be installed with an air-gap. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025
The grout in the kitchen tiles are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
